original text:
Body Balance has found itself a new home at Cotham Chiropractic Clinic, this is the link to their website http://cothamchiropracticclinic.com. The address is: 3 Cotham Road, Cotham, Bristol, BS6 6DG. There is a car park at the front of the building and plenty of 'pay and display' street parking outside.
My email address and phone number will remain the same, so if you have any questions please do let me know. I look forward to seeing you soon.
processed_text:
Body Balance has found itself a new home at Cotham Chiropractic Clinic, this is the link to their website . The address is: 3 Cotham Road, Cotham, Bristol, BS6 6DG. There is a car park at the front of the building and plenty of 'pay and display' street parking outside.
My email address and phone number will remain the same, so if you have any questions please do let me know. I look forward to seeing you soon.
